_comment: Universal function-calling schema for mythosforge-3d. Hand the matching block to any tool-use LLM. Parameters identical across shapes; only the envelope differs. openai = OpenAI / Bankr LLM Gateway / Surplus / Codex / Cursor. anthropic = Claude Messages API tool-use.

image.description: Path or URL to the source image to convert to 3D.

model.description: Optional Replicate 3D model slug override (default firtoz/trellis).

image-mode.description: Image input mode for an unmapped --model.

output-key.description: Named output key holding the GLB uri for an unmapped --model.

function.name: mythosforge_3d
function.description: Convert an image into a 3D model (GLB) via Replicate (default firtoz/trellis). Writes the .glb to disk and returns its local path. Requires the caller's own REPLICATE_API_TOKEN in the execution environment. Note: 3D generation can take minutes.

image.description: Path or URL to the source image.

image-mode.description: Image input mode for an unmapped --model.

output-key.description: Named output key holding the GLB uri for an unmapped --model.

anthropic.name: mythosforge_3d
anthropic.description: Convert an image into a 3D model (GLB) via Replicate (default firtoz/trellis). Writes the .glb to disk and returns its local path. Requires the caller's own REPLICATE_API_TOKEN in the execution environment. Note: 3D generation can take minutes.

image.description: Path or URL to the source image.

image-mode.description: Image input mode for an unmapped --model.

output-key.description: Named output key holding the GLB uri for an unmapped --model.

invocation.note: When the model emits a tool call with the args above, the host harness maps them to this shell command and runs it (REPLICATE_API_TOKEN must be set in that environment):
invocation.returns: A JSON line: { ok, image, model, path, bytes }. Feed `path` back to the model as the tool result.
